## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Type Of Change

- [ ] `feat` new feature
- [ ] `fix` bug fix
- [ ] `docs` documentation
- [ ] `refactor` internal change
- [ ] `test` tests
- [ ] `chore` maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant tests/checks locally
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior changed
- [ ] I considered security and backward compatibility impact

## Linked Issues

Closes #
